title: The Biscuit Room Turns Deadly
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Monet, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the biscuit room turns deadly.
scene: The scene focuses on the biscuit room turns deadly, with Monet, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Monet
dialogue.text: Look... We're already surrounded by deep snow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I expect that you're getting unbearably sleepy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You really dug your own grave. Goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Don't you want to go home!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This has nothing to do with you!!

summary: The Biscuit Room Turns Deadly. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
